---
title: "GLEAM trajectory mapping"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM trajectory mapping}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
tr <- test_pathway_trajectory(sc, pseudotime = "pseudotime", lineage = "lineage")
plot_pseudotime_score(sc, pathway = rownames(sc$score)[1], pseudotime = "pseudotime", lineage = "lineage")
```
